name: together-models
description: Together AI serverless inference (OpenAI-compatible). Bring your own Together API key.
author: PersonalClaw

x-meta.label: Together AI API Key
x-meta.help: Your Together AI API key. Leave empty to fall back to the TOGETHER_API_KEY environment variable.

x-meta.label: Default Model
x-meta.help: A Together AI model id. Empty = resolved from live /v1/models discovery.

x-meta.label: Base URL
x-meta.help: Optional override of the Together AI base URL. Empty uses https://api.together.xyz/v1.
